title: poa lanuginosa
intro: Poa lanuginosa, also known as woolly blue grass, is a perennial grass native to the western United States and Canada. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Poa lanuginosa include its potential to improve cardiovascular health and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as diabetes and cancer. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and also used in herbal infusions and salves to promote wound healing and reduce pain.
